title: Logistics Shipment — Bronze Source Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating raw logistics shipment records from daily CSV files provided by the logistics partner, before ingestion into brz_freshsip.logistics_shipments_raw.

shipment_id.description: Unique shipment identifier assigned by the logistics partner; used for deduplication in Silver

order_id.description: FreshSip ERP order identifier that this shipment fulfills; cross-references erp_sales_raw

batch_id.description: Production batch identifier for the goods in this shipment; optional field required for KPI-P04 batch traceability. If present, must match a batch_id in the production IoT data. If absent, batch traceability for this shipment will be null.

warehouse_id.description: Origin warehouse from which the shipment departed

route_id.description: Logistics route identifier; used for route performance KPI (KPI-D04)

carrier_id.description: Carrier or logistics company identifier; informational only

ship_date.description: Date the shipment departed the warehouse; cast to DATE in Silver

promised_delivery_date.description: Committed delivery date from ERP order; used as the benchmark for OTD calculation; cast to DATE in Silver

actual_delivery_date.description: Actual date the shipment was received at the destination; may be null until delivery is confirmed; cast to DATE in Silver

cases_delivered.description: Number of cases confirmed delivered; cast to INTEGER in Silver

logistics_cost_usd.description: Total logistics cost for this shipment in USD; cast to DECIMAL in Silver; used for cost-per-case KPI

region.description: US geographic region of the destination

state.description: US state code of the destination

is_fully_shipped.description: Whether all ordered items were shipped; cast to BOOLEAN in Silver; used for fulfillment rate KPI

quantity_ordered.description: Original quantity ordered by the retailer; cast to INTEGER in Silver

quantity_shipped.description: Quantity actually included in this shipment; may be less than quantity_ordered for partial shipments; cast to INTEGER in Silver
